criteria.description: The main code works correctly without errors that prevent its execution. We can ignore small incompatibilities or special cases.

rules.description: The main function does not work correctly.
The main function does not execute the expected flow.

criteria.description: The complete program solves the proposed problem according to the requirements. We can ignore small incompatibilities or special cases or missing of some informative prints.

rules.description: The program is near to the solving of the proposed problem.
The program is half way to solve the proposed problem. We ignore some error in function definition, considering that the functions work as expected.
The program is far from solving the proposed problem. We ignore some error in function definition, considering that the functions work as expected.
The program is completely different from the proposed problem.
